issues.description: TrashFromHand is a cost (optional 'may'), not a primary action. Should be structured as a cost condition, not the main action. The ReturnToHand should be the primary action.
ReturnToHand target scope incomplete: card text allows 'return to hand OR place at bottom of deck' but DSL only includes ReturnToHand option. Missing alternative action for deck placement.
Target should be 'OpponentCharacter' not 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' (scope handles selection semantics).
